subject: Public Health
title: Social Upheaval of the Plague
description: A 60-second lesson on Social Upheaval of the Plague.

hook.text: When half your neighbors die, society doesn't just mourn—it transforms.

buildup.text: Labor shortages gave surviving peasants bargaining power—wages rose as workers became scarce.

discovery.text: The feudal system cracked. Serfs demanded freedom and landowners couldn't refuse.

twist.text: Jewish communities were scapegoated and massacred across Europe—blamed for poisoning wells.

climax.text: The plague accelerated social changes that took centuries to mature—including the end of serfdom.

punchline.text: Death reshaped the economy more than any king could.

quiz.question: How did the Black Death affect the feudal labor system?
options: Labor shortages gave peasants more bargaining power
